title: T-097 — Shared factory release status/read model and events
prompt:
# T-097 — shared factory release status/read model and events

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md final decisions + 2026-05-03 E2E release spike
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Define and implement the canonical release status/read model consumed by NPD, Technical, Planning and factory views so `Built`/D365 export is never confused with factory availability.

## Status model
Minimum canonical states:
- `pending_npd_release`
- `pending_technical_approval`
- `approved_for_factory`
- `released_to_factory`
- `blocked`

Required fields include `factory_available_at`, `factory_approved_by`, `release_event_id`, `active_bom_header_id`, `active_factory_spec_id`, `release_blockers`, and project/FG references.

Events:
`npd.project.release_requested`, `npd.builder.released_records_created`, `technical.factory_spec.approved`, `fg.released_to_factory`, `fg.release_blocked`.

Technical approval is required before factory_spec/BOM can be used by factory/Planning. D365 export never sets this state.

pipeline_inputs.description: Canonical factory release status/read model and event transitions for NPD/Technical/Planning/factory consumers.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Adds release state separate from D365 Built/export and transitions based on NPD Builder release plus Technical factory_spec/BOM approval.
Preserved acceptance requirements: Given Planning/factory consumers query the read model, then only approved_for_factory/released_to_factory rows are factory-usable; pending/blocked rows expose typed blockers.; Given a release is blocked, then fg.release_blocked event includes typed blockers and remediation links.
acceptance_criteria: Before Technical approval, release status is pending_technical_approval with active IDs and factory_available_at null.
Real Technical approval event for active BOM/spec bundle transitions to approved_for_factory/released_to_factory.
D365 export alone never transitions release status.
Factory/Planning consumers only treat approved_for_factory/released_to_factory as usable and see blockers otherwise.
test_strategy: RED migration/schema tests for status enum/fields/FKs/RLS.
RED transition tests for pending → approved/released and blocked.
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test factory-release-status'.
risk_red_lines: Do not reuse Status_Overall='Built' as canonical factory release status.
Do not let D365 export set approved_for_factory/released_to_factory.
Do not expose pending_technical_approval as factory-usable.
Do not allow factory use without Technical-approved factory_spec/BOM.
